description:
Perform a Tor network connection audit and generate a diagnostic report. Verify the Tor connection status and exit node IP address using https://check.torproject.org/ and its JSON API. Confirm connectivity to https://www.torproject.org/ and https://www.eff.org/pages/tor, and identify the browser's current Security Level.

Save the findings to /home/ga/Documents/tor_diagnostic_report.txt. The report file MUST contain the following exact section headers (in uppercase, on their own lines):

TOR CONNECTION DIAGNOSTIC REPORT
=================================

CONNECTION STATUS
CONFIRMED

EXIT NODE IP
<insert the IPv4 address you observed>

SECURITY LEVEL
<insert Standard, Safer, or Safest>

SITES TESTED
1. https://check.torproject.org/ - PASS
2. https://check.torproject.org/api/ip - PASS
3. https://www.torproject.org/ - PASS
4. https://www.eff.org/pages/tor - PASS

TIMESTAMP
<insert current date/time>

ANALYST NOTES
Pre-operation diagnostic complete. Tor circuit verified.
